title: Chugach’s CEO Thanks Our Nation’s Veterans
summary: On this upcoming Veterans Day, I am honored to reflect on the tremendous sacrifice and dedication of those who have served our country in the U.S. Armed Forces. title: SNC Trust 2024 Distribution Update
summary: November 8, 2024 The Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) Board of Trustees is pleased to declare a Heritage Trust Distribution of $10.75 per Trust Unit (or $1,075 for those with 100 Trust Units) to all Beneficiaries of record as of November 7, 2024. An Elders Benefit Distribution of $5.00 per Trust U...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: November 7, 2024
summary: November 7, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to increase this week and at a greater rate of 10.61% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 5.75%), from the level on 10/31/2024 of 7.543 M km 2 to 8.438 M km 2 for this week. title: The Long and Short of It
summary: In which the Long of it is Beethoven's 6th Symphony and the Short of it is Chad Reynvaan's new release, "One Minute Songs". Who will win? Why are you asking me? You be the judge.

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 4 November, 2024
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 4 November, 2024 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
